column1: My bill shows ₹4,200 but my plan is ₹799. I have not used any extra services or add-ons. Please reverse the extra charges.
I was charged twice for the same recharge — ₹599 debited two times on 3rd July via UPI (ref UPI-8823714). Kindly refund one of them.

Hello team, this is regarding account 98220-11341. My June postpaid bill is ₹1,540 against my ₹399 plan. It lists an international SMS pack of ₹350 and a data booster of ₹790 which I never activated. Please investigate and adjust in the next cycle.
Why is ₹49 being deducted from my prepaid balance every week for some VAS SMS pack I never subscribed to?? Stop it and refund my money.
There has been no signal at all in Baner, Pune since yesterday evening. Calls fail immediately and mobile data is dead. I work from home and this is costing me my job.
Call drops every two or three minutes in Indiranagar, Bengaluru for the past week. Voice quality is terrible even with full bars showing.
4G speed in Salt Lake, Kolkata falls to under 0.5 Mbps every evening. I am on the ₹499 plan with 2GB per day — video calls are impossible after 7pm.
Internet has been completely down in Sector 62, Noida since this morning after the storm. When will the tower be repaired? My son has online exams tomorrow.
Please upgrade my plan from ₹299 to the ₹499 plan effective from my next recharge cycle. My number is 98200-45678.
I am relocating from Hyderabad to Chennai at the end of this month and want to shift my postpaid connection. Can a new SIM be delivered to my Chennai address?
I lost my phone yesterday evening. Please block my current SIM immediately and issue an eSIM replacement for the same number, 99880-12345.
What prepaid plans do you have under ₹500 that include daily data?
I am travelling to Singapore next week. How do I activate international roaming and what will it cost per day?
Is 5G available in Nagpur yet? Do I need to change my SIM or my plan to use it?

This is the third time I am writing!! My bill is wrong AND the network barely works half the day. ₹649 gone every month for what exactly?? Someone call me back today or I am porting out to another operator.
hi sim not wrking plz do the needful... recharge done yesterda ₹239 but stil showing no plan activ?? also net very slow som times. 98220 monthly custmer
